name: Asus Prime  B650M-A (Wifi) II
highlights: ASUS PRIME B650M-A WIFI II is a micro-ATX motherboard built for AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors on the AM5 socket, offering top-tier DDR5 memory support, PCIe 5
Designed with robust power delivery, advanced cooling, and ASUS 5X Protection III, it ensures stable performance and long-term durability for gaming and productivity builds
description: Asus Prime B650M-A (Wifi) II Price in Pakistan Category Details Model ASUS PRIME B650M-A WIFI II CPU Support AMD Socket AM5 for Ryzen™ 9000 / 8000 / 7000 Series Chipset AMD B650 Form Factor Micro-ATX (24.4 x 24.4 cm) Memory Support 4 x DDR5 DIMMs, up to 192GB, up to 7600+ MHz (OC), ECC & Non-ECC, Dual Channel Graphics Output 1 x HDMI 2.1 (4K@60Hz), 1 x DisplayPort 1.4 (8K@60Hz), 1 x VGA Expansion Slots – 1 x PCIe 4.0 x16 (mode varies by CPU)- 2 x PCIe 4.0 x16 (x1 mode) Storage Options
